Attr.IDPrefixLocal TYPE: string VERSION: 1.2.0 DEFAULT: '' --DESCRIPTION-- Temporary prefix for IDs used in conjunction with %Attr.IDPrefix. If you need to allow multiple sets of user content on web page, you may need to have a separate prefix that changes with each iteration. This way, separately submitted user content displayed on the same page doesn't clobber each other. Ideal values are unique identifiers for the content it represents (i.e. the id of the row in the database). Be sure to add a separator (like an underscore) at the end. Warning: this directive will not work unless %Attr.IDPrefix is set to a non-empty value! --# vim: et sw=4 sts=4
